about.headline:
Two disciplines.
One unified vision.
about.p1: I started as a graphic designer in 2002, building visual identities, campaign assets, and brand systems. But I was always driven by the same question: why do some pieces work while others don't?
about.p2: That curiosity led me into digital marketing and eventually into marketing automation. Since 2014, I've specialized in growth strategy: audience segmentation, data modeling, customer lifecycle, journey mapping, and the technical implementation of platforms like Eloqua, Marketo, Salesforce Marketing Cloud, HubSpot, Responsys, and Acoustic.
about.p3: Today, I work at the intersection of both worlds: bringing strategic thinking into design challenges, and creative judgment into data-driven decisions. I've led both technology and creative teams for brands like 3M LATAM, Abbott, Christus Muguerza, and KidZania, always with one eye on results and the other on user experience.
about.p4: I specialize in email marketing and deliverability, one of the most technical and often overlooked areas in digital marketing.
about.p5: I'm currently looking for a role where I can lead teams and projects while staying close to execution.

trajectory.headline: Where I've been.
trajectory.line1: Two decades across design, marketing automation, growth strategy and technology, always building things that actually work.

milestones.achievement: Graduated with a degree in Graphic Design.
Graphic, editorial, and advertising design for brands including Amway LATAM, Capistrano, Henkel, and Christus Muguerza.
Graphic design, production, and video editing for brands including Liomont, Roche, and Adidas.
Graphic design and video editing for brands including Seguritec, Sepsa, and Cometra.
Development of FinTech lead generation strategies.
Product Owner for Evaluatest. Development of lead generation strategies.
Coordination of MarTech teams and projects for brands including 3M LATAM, Christus Muguerza, Abbott, Silanes, and Grupo Vidanta.
Consulting in Digital Marketing and Design.

mindsetHeader.headline: How I think within a campaign.
mindsetHeader.paragraph: I'm not just the executor or just the analyst. I operate across all three layers and that fundamentally changes the quality of what gets built.

cards.title: Strategic
cards.subtitle: Understand before you execute.
cards.desc: Everything starts with a clear mental model: who the user is, how they behave, and what they need at each stage. Without that, execution is just noise.
skills: Data modeling
Designing structures that support segmentation, personalization, and reporting.
Segmentation
Defining dynamic audiences based on behavior and lifecycle.
Customer Journey
Mapping interactions to design relevant communication flows.
Hyper-personalization
Using implicit and explicit attributes to tailor every message.
CRM Architecture
Structuring data and systems for scalability.
Reporting
Defining the right metrics to evaluate performance.

cards.title: Operational
cards.subtitle: Strategy is only as good as its execution.
cards.desc: I implement what I design. I know these platforms inside out their limits, their workarounds, and how to make them work together.
skills: Marketing Automation
Flows in Eloqua, Marketo, SFMC, HubSpot, Responsys, and Acoustic from welcome series to cart recovery.
Campaigns
End-to-end setup: lists, segments, templates, scheduling, A/B testing, and QA. Nothing goes live without a checklist.
MarTech Integrations
Connecting automation platforms, CRM, ecommerce, and analytics through APIs, webhooks, and native connectors.
Asset development
Using attributes and dynamic content to tailor every message.
IP Warm-up & Ramp-up
IP warming plans for new infrastructure. I protect domain reputation from day one.
AI Integrations
Leveraging AI models for content personalization, behavior prediction, and send-time optimization.

cards.title: Analytical
cards.subtitle: Data doesn't lie, but it can be misread.
cards.desc: I read metrics in context, not in isolation. A strong open rate can hide a segmentation issue. A low CTR might point to a design problem.
skills: Dashboard creation
Reports in Looker Studio, Tableau, and Power BI integrated with GA4 and automation platforms.
Insight analysis
Open rate, CTR, CTOR, bounce, unsubscribe, sessions, conversions, funnel drop-off, LTV, CAC, and churn.
Email Deliverability
Domain and IP reputation, bounce logs, suppression lists, and authentication: SPF, DKIM, DMARC.
Campaign optimization
Continuous improvement cycles: refining segments, copy, timing, frequency, and channels.
Issue diagnosis
Identifying deliverability issues, engagement drops, tracking anomalies, and integration errors.
Attribution modeling
Understanding which channels truly drive conversions beyond last-click attribution.

services.headline: What I can do for you.
services.paragraph: If you need someone who understands both strategy and creative execution without having to translate between the two, we should work together.
services.line1: I've led teams where design, technology, and strategy coexist and I know that the gap between those worlds is closed through clear communication, not hierarchy. I manage projects with a focus on measurable outcomes, realistic timelines, and teams that grow along the way.

cards.title: Creative and technical team management
cards.desc: Coordinating cross-functional teams: designers, developers, automation specialists, and analysts. I bridge disciplines so everyone moves in the same direction.

cards.title: Briefing and scope definition
cards.desc: Gathering requirements, documenting scope, and defining deliverables. A solid brief prevents 80% of project issues.

cards.title: Stakeholder and client management
cards.desc: Managing expectations, communicating progress, and escalating decisions. I know when to shield the team from last-minute changes and when to adapt.

cards.title: Mentorship and talent development
cards.desc: Supporting junior and mid-level profiles in their technical and strategic growth. I focus on building teams that don't rely on me for every decision.

cards.title: Cross-functional communication
cards.desc: Acting as a bridge between design, technology, and business. I speak all three languages, reducing friction, accelerating decisions, and improving output quality.

cards.title: Project tracking and delivery
cards.desc: Managing timelines, identifying blockers, and handling dependencies across teams. I'd rather fix a problem on Tuesday than explain it on Friday.

projects.headline: Work driven by business goals.
projects.p1: Every project here started with a business problem. Design and strategy were the way to solve it.
projects.p2: I don't just show what it looks like, I show why it works.
projects.disclamer1: Some projects were developed during my time at different agencies.
projects.disclamer2: All rights belong to their respective clients.
projects.disclamer3: They are presented here for portfolio purposes only.

modal.personalizationDesc: This project uses dynamic content for personalization. Enter your name to see how it works on the ugly sweater.

contact.headline: Building something interesting?
contact.paragraph: I'm exploring new roles and select projects. If you're looking for someone who understands the business, designs the solution, and measures whether it works, let's talk.
